messages.text: Hi, I'm Kendra. I've been training for the Boston Marathon.
messages.speaker: Kendra

messages.text: I love Nike running shoes, they're the best for long distance.
messages.speaker: Kendra

messages.text: My goal is to finish the Boston Marathon under 4 hours.
messages.speaker: Kendra

messages.text: I've been working with Coach Sarah on my training plan.
messages.speaker: Kendra

messages.text: Actually, I switched to Adidas. The arch support is much better for my feet.
messages.speaker: Kendra

messages.text: I completed the Boston Marathon! Finished in 3:45:00.
messages.speaker: Kendra
